open_problems.name: Exhaustiveness Obligation
open_problems.question: Are PCL, AGC, and ICI exhaustive over all finite non-intrinsic objective-boundary strategies in O_OWT environments?
open_problems.status: Stage 4 candidate architecture; not theorem closure
open_problems.would_close_if: A formal argument shows every finite objective-boundary strategy reduces to PCL, AGC, or ICI under O_OWT conditions.
open_problems.would_break_if: A fourth strategy class satisfies all three stability conditions simultaneously — policy-adequate without decoupling, no unbounded revision requirement, no load-bearing maintenance cost.

open_problems.name: Dynamic Blanket Stress Test M1
open_problems.question: Do an optimizer's own interventions in O_OWT environments generate qualitatively new causal structure faster than any bounded tracking process can absorb?
open_problems.status: proposed empirical hinge; DBST-M0 did not isolate causal propagation from event-rate effects
open_problems.would_support_AGC_if: Positive DBST-M1 result under stated conditions.
open_problems.would_weaken_AGC_if: Clean negative DBST-M1 result under stated conditions — the most valuable possible outcome.

open_problems.name: Audit Regress
open_problems.question: Can a prediction/action firewall keep excluded variables X out of the objective while using X deeply enough for prediction accuracy in O_OWT environments?
open_problems.would_close_if: Formal methods review confirms the CIT/SOMR chain — complexity of X-tracking grows without bound under OWT-2.
open_problems.would_break_or_scope_if: Safe residual manifold or quiet manifold construction survives adversarial review.

open_problems.name: V(t) Latent Construct Validation
open_problems.question: Is V(t) a supported latent explanatory construct for the joint behavior of recovery latency, behavioral diversity, and signal sensitivity in human subjects?
open_problems.status: Draft protocol; not ready to file or run; requires latent-variable specialist review
open_problems.note: Do not cite as a result. Pre-registration required before data collection.

open_problems.name: DRG Frame Manipulation Mechanism Discrimination
open_problems.question: Can frame manipulation versus matched-signal controls discriminate between policy-level gap and training-distribution explanations for completion-recognition failures in frontier models?
open_problems.status: Prospective pre-registration; prior matched-signal replication null reported (criterion not met in 1 of 3 models)
